description: 15 live scenarios: +L09 error recovery, +L10 conditional accum, +L11 string ops, +L12 dict agg, +L13 fibonacci, +L14 matrix ops, +L15 stateful counter
17 live scenarios + enhanced state_summary (shows values for scalars). +L16 recursive tree, +L17 set ops. L12 simplified. L16 was flaky before state_summary fix.
L12 simplified (removed flaky top_item assertion), L16 simplified (no recursion). 2/2 robustness runs clean.
20 live scenarios, 6 capabilities. +L18 compaction recovery, +L19 branch switch, +L20 session resume. Implemented restore_snapshot, switch_branch, compact in live runner.
23 live scenarios, 9 capabilities. +L21 context window, +L22 steering, +L23 follow-up. Added steering/follow_up/compact turn types to scenario system.
26 live scenarios, 10 capabilities. +L24 tree integrity, +L25 compact+continue, +L26 long conversation. Full capability coverage achieved. 2/2 robustness clean.
28 live scenarios, 10 caps. +L27 multi-iteration, +L28 resume-after-compact. Hardened L10/L21/L22/L26. Improved context builder (state_summary label). 3/3 robustness clean.
30 live scenarios, 10 caps. +L29 self-correction, +L30 integration stress. Hardened L22 (simplified steering test). 3/3 robustness clean (110/110 each).
External benchmarks: MINT 23/23 (20 tasks: 8 gsm8k, 7 humaneval, 2 mbpp, 3 multi-turn), tau-bench 15/15 (8 tasks: 5 retail, 3 airline). Added extra_checks for multi-turn MINT, expanded both datasets.

Real external data: MINT 47 tasks (20 gsm8k, 14 humaneval, 13 mbpp from MINT-bench repo), tau-bench 37 tasks (17 retail, 20 airline from tau-bench repo). GSM8K=20/20, HumanEval=~12/14, MBPP=~6/13, tau=~66/69. MBPP hardest for 9B model.
